new.description: Citrix NetScaler CVE Preconditions Checker as per CTX696604 | Supported CVE : CVE-2026-8451, CVE-2026-8452, CVE-2026-8655, CVE-2026-10816, CVE-2026-10817, and CVE-2026-13474

new.name: CVE-2026-55200
new.description: CVE-2026-55200 - Critical libssh2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability

new.name: CVE-2026-30784-rustdesk-poc
new.description: CVE-2026-30784: RustDesk hbbs Traffic Amplification PoC & PCAP Analysis

new.name: Linux-Kernel-Vulnerabilities-CVE-2026-23111
new.description: High Severity LPE vulnerability in Linux Kernel, with a CVS score of 7.8. An inverted check from user enables a process inside the container to break out of the sandbox along with full root privileges on user PC. I have been investigating about this vulnerability and has a lightweight script that runs in the terminal to check if you are vulnerable.

new.name: CVE-2021-27877-PoC
new.description: A modified version of the Rapid7 Metasploit module for CVE-2021-27877 that supports direct command execution for reliable vulnerability validation. Includes documentation explaining the exploit workflow, the module modifications, and usage examples.

new.name: session_reaper_lab

new.name: polyshellv2.0
new.description: PolyShell v2.0 — Magento Unauthenticated RCE & SessionReaper Detection

new.name: magento-open-source-security
new.description: Magento 2 security modules for Qoliber open source patches and fixes.
